headline: SoundHound AI, HubSpot, Asana, Zoom, and Akamai Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after the latest Consumer Price Index (CPI) report came in hotter than expected, signaling that inflation remained stubbornly high.
